steps.title: Bracket the aside
steps.content: The word though interrupts the main sentence after position. Because it is parenthetical, it needs commas on both sides before the sentence continues with the as clause about Earth's orbit.

steps.title: Use matching commas
steps.content: Choice B uses a semicolon before a dependent continuation. Choice C lacks the closing comma after though. Choice D wrongly places a semicolon after the parenthetical. The remaining choice correctly brackets though with commas. The answer is A.
